title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 15 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 15 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 15 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/05/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 4.17 % today, the main contract closed at 725.The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are not active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is less. PBF at Shandong port deal 785- 790 yuan/mt.
